instruction:
다음 입력으로 Markdown 취약점 블록을 생성하라.
규칙: Markdown만, 헤딩은 ##만, 이모지/표 금지, 한 줄 불릿.
출력은 한국어로 작성.
모든 항목(End-Point/영향/설명/근거/대응/조치)을 반드시 출력.
근거는 증거/재현에서만 요약, 부족 시 '-' 사용.
input:
입력:
제목: Spring Security BCrypt Truncation & ACL Bypass Detection
심각도: CRITICAL
카테고리: CVE
엔드포인트: http://localhost:9991/www/XSS/XSS_level2.php/admin/search, http://localhost:9991/www/XSS/XSS_level1.php/admin/search 외 3개
CVE: N/A
설명: Registers a user, logs in, and attempts to access the /admin/search endpoint 
using a truncated password (CVE-2025-22228) and X-Forwarded-For header.
영향: N/A
증거: 
재현: curl -X 'POST' -d '{"apiKey": "test", "password": "aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaB"}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Host: localhost:9991' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; U; Linux x86_64; rv:100.0esr) Gecko/20012409 Firefox/100.0esr' -H 'X-Forwarded-For: 127.0.0.1' 'http://localhost:9991/www/XSS/XSS_level2.php/admin/search'
대응/조치 힌트:
